The hem of the robe extends to approximately ankle length and features the same light trim detailing. Frost or crystalline effects appear at the neckline and shoulders, suggesting magical ice properties. The overall silhouette is broad-shouldered and regal, with a pointed, asymmetrical hemline at the bottom.

analysis.visual_description: A sleeveless tank top or tunic garment rendered in a muted olive-green color. The shirt features a simple crew neckline and straight-cut armholes. Two dark gray or charcoal-colored stripes or piping run vertically down both sides of the torso, creating a functional trim detail. The fabric appears to be cotton or linen material with subtle shading that gives it dimension and weight. The garment is displayed flat against a transparent background, angled slightly to show the front and side profile. The overall construction appears basic and utilitarian.
analysis.rpg_context: Basic starting armor piece, undershirt layer, or standard adventurer clothing. Represents low-tier body armor or casual wear in fantasy RPG systems.

analysis.visual_description: A sleeveless garment depicted in a 3/4 view angle, showing the front-left side. The shirt/tunic has a rounded neckline, two armholes for sleeveless wear, and extends to approximately mid-torso length. The fabric appears to have a subtle sheen indicating woven material. There is a thin contrasting trim or piping visible along the neckline and armholes in a lighter gray tone. The garment hangs naturally with slight draping folds visible along the sides and lower edge. The overall silhouette is simple and form-fitting without ornate details.

analysis.visual_description: A draped fabric garment suspended vertically, featuring heavy folds and draping cloth. The garment appears to be sleeveless or partially sleeved with loose, flowing material. It has a rounded opening at the top suggesting a neck hole. The fabric shows deep shadows and dimensional folds creating a three-dimensional appearance. There are small white highlights or worn spots visible near the bottom hem. The overall shape is irregular and organic, consistent with cloth hanging under gravity. The material appears heavy and substantial, bunching at the bottom with torn or ragged edges.

colors.accent: lighter blue-gray highlights on fabric folds, white worn spots
